category_sources: Official website and README describe hexapoda as a colorful modal hex editor.
source_facts.description says it is a colorful modal hex editor.
docs_sources: Official README says the website has more detailed documentation and links to the config documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official hexapoda website.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/simonomi/hexapoda; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official website lists modal editing, multiple selections, configurable keybinds, undo/redo, and byte inspection.
source_facts.description identifies a colorful modal hex editor.
